title: Creating Context and Provider
description: Learn to create a Context object and provide values to children.

slides.title: The Context API 🎁
slides.content:
# Context = Global (ish) Data

Context provides a way to share values between components without explicitly passing a prop through every level.

## Steps:
1. Create a context with `createContext`.
2. Provide a value using a `Provider` component.
3. Consume the value in any descendant.

slides.title: Creating a Context
Using the Provider

quizData.question: What does `createContext()` return?

options.text: An object containing Provider and Consumer

quizData.explanation: createContext returns an object with `Provider` and `Consumer` (though we usually use `useContext` instead of `Consumer`).
